title: T-Mobile Bringing New Stores and More 5G to Texas
text: BELLEVUE, Wash.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--T-Mobile continues to ramp up its presence in Texas with the opening of 18 new retail stores across the state in 2023 and the planned opening of more than a dozen additional stores now through 2024. title: T-Mobile: Dividend Declared, But Is It A Buy For Long-Term Dividend Investors?
text: T-Mobile recently declared a $0.65 dividend, payable in December. TMUS's recent dividend is well-covered for now. But the company will need to continue growing its cash flows in the coming years to sustain its dividend payment for the long term.

text: BELLEVUE, Wash.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--T-Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) today announced a donation totaling $50,000 to five Virginia nonprofit organizations that are making a difference in their communities. title: 3 Monthly Dividend Stocks to Buy and Hold for the Long-Term
